description: One-row headline scorecard: total, oldest/newest year, veterans, NCAP, leases, AWD, EVs, hydrogen, accident flags. Use when user asks oldest car, hydrogen count, or broad overview facts.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS total_registered_cars = COUNT(*), oldest_registration_year = MIN(_foerste_registrering_aar), newest_registration_year = MAX(_foerste_registrering_aar), veteran_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningVeteranKoeretoejOriginal == true, ncap_tested_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningNCAPTest == true, cars_on_active_lease = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL, awd_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTraekkendeAkslerListe == 2, electric_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El", hydrogen_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Brint", accident_damaged_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTrafikskade == true | LIMIT 1
